windows-intel-llamacpp.label: Intel Arc / upstream llama.cpp SYCL
windows-intel-llamacpp.note: Secondary engine on Arc. Used for models (like Gemma 4) whose architecture is not yet in IPEX-LLM's Ollama build. Runs alongside the main Ollama engine.

windows-amd.label: AMD Radeon / stock Ollama (ROCm)
windows-amd.note: Stock Ollama Windows ZIP auto-detects AMD ROCm for supported cards. Set HSA_OVERRIDE_GFX_VERSION for unlisted cards (e.g. 11.0.0 for gfx1100). Strix Halo (gfx1151) may need the override on older Ollama builds.

windows-amd-llamacpp.label: AMD Radeon / upstream llama.cpp Vulkan
windows-amd-llamacpp.note: Vulkan sidecar for AMD. Works on any modern Radeon (and covers Strix Halo iGPU). Used for models Ollama's ROCm build doesn't yet support (e.g. Gemma 4).

darwin-apple.label: Apple Silicon / stock Ollama
darwin-apple.note: Pinned to v0.21.0 for Gemma 4 MLX runtime support.

linux-nvidia.label: NVIDIA / stock Ollama (CUDA)
linux-nvidia.note: Ollama Linux tarball is unified — auto-detects CUDA when the NVIDIA driver + CUDA runtime are present.

linux-amd.label: AMD Radeon / stock Ollama (ROCm)
linux-amd.note: Auto-detects ROCm when amdgpu + rocm-libs are installed. For Strix Halo (gfx1151) and some older cards you may need HSA_OVERRIDE_GFX_VERSION=11.0.0 (or 11.5.1 for gfx1151 on newer ROCm).

linux-amd-llamacpp.label: AMD Radeon / upstream llama.cpp Vulkan
linux-amd-llamacpp.note: Vulkan sidecar for AMD on Linux. Runs Gemma 4 (and any other model not yet in Ollama's ROCm build) on Radeon discrete GPUs and Strix Halo iGPU.
